# Claude Hacks

> A hackathon powered by Claude AI, hosted by the Claude Builders Club at The Ohio State University.

## Event Details

- Name: Claude Hacks
- Dates: April 17-19, 2026
- Location: Pomerene Hall 280, The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH 43210
- Participants: 100 (registration closed, at capacity)
- Website: https://claudehacks.com

## Format

- Friday 5:30-8 PM: Kickoff, check-in, food, introductions, in-person work
- Saturday: Virtual hacking day, continue building remotely
- Sunday 11 AM+: Project submissions due 11 AM, judging at 12 PM, food at 1 PM

## Tracks

- Open: Build anything with Claude AI, no restrictions on topic or domain
- Sustainability: Build solutions addressing environmental or sustainability challenges

## Prizes

- 1st Place: $750 API Credits + $300 Cash
- 2nd Place: $500 API Credits
- 3rd Place: $250 API Credits
- Total: $1,800+ in prizes

## Judges From

- NVIDIA
- Meta
- Google
- IGS Energy
- AWS
- Vertiv

## Rules

- Teams of 1-4 members, all must be registered
- All code must be written during the hackathon
- Projects must use the Claude API meaningfully
- Any programming language, framework, or platform allowed
- Submissions due by 11:00 AM Sunday April 19
- Judging criteria: Innovation, Technical Complexity, Impact, Presentation

## Registration

Registration is closed. All 100 spots have been filled.

## Community

- Discord: https://discord.gg/Re7FCAkS

## Contact

- Instagram: @claudeatohiostate
- Hosted by: Claude Builders Club at Ohio State
